identity.name: ConstructionOS
principles: Fusion: Swiss Style x Industrial Safety
Content: Data is the hero, UI is the scaffold
Zoom: Focus on critical site metrics
Negative Space: High density for data, breathing room for decisions

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-bold shadow-sm uppercase tracking-wide text-xs md:text-sm h-10 px-6
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-sm font-medium shadow-sm h-10 px-6
buttons.outline: border-2 border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm font-medium h-10 px-6
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm font-medium h-10 px-4

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-sm rounded-sm

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js and index.css immediately to use the defined color palette. The 'Yellow' must be #FFD700.
2. FONT SETUP: Import Manrope and Inter from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. COMPONENT STYLE: Override default Shadcn radius to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a more industrial/construction look.
4. MOBILE FIRST: Ensure all forms and dashboards stack vertically on mobile. Use 'hidden md:block' for complex tables on mobile, replacing them with card views.
5. NAVIGATION: Use a Sidebar for Desktop and a Bottom Sheet or Hamburger menu for Mobile.
6. CLIENT PORTAL: Must be read-only. Use the 'blueprints' images as backgrounds for the portal login.
7. SITE RECEIPT: This is a critical mobile flow. Make the buttons LARGE (h-14) for fat fingers/gloves.
8. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to every interactive element.
universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle noise.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
